text: Standing in this modern, slightly tilted corridor, I sense the boundary between everyday utility—signified by the fire hose and sterile design—and realms of creativity just behind the glass. There is anticipation in me: the promise that just one step forward leads to a space of innovation and contemplation. My curiosity stirs; I feel drawn to the illuminated R+D room, eager to immerse myself in ideas, to witness the convergence of thought and technology. I feel both small and significant in this liminal space, on the threshold of discovery.
